steps.title: Parse the equation structure
steps.content: In $68x + 85y = 1,258$: $x$ is consulting hours, $y$ is drawing up plans hours, and 1,258 is total dollars earned. The equation structure shows: (rate) × (hours) + (rate) × (hours) = total earnings. Therefore, 68 and 85 must be hourly rates.

steps.title: Identify what 68 represents
steps.content: The coefficient 68 multiplies $x$ (consulting hours), so it must be the consulting hourly rate. For dimensional consistency: (dollars/hour) × (hours) = dollars, so 68 has units of \$/hour. The interior designer earned \$68 per hour consulting. That matches choice A — A is correct.
